member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.BoolExtensions
member.summary: Fluent extension methods for that branch on the value of a condition, allowing / logic to be expressed as a single expression.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.BoolExtensions.IfTrue``1(System.Boolean,System.Func{``0},System.Func{``0})
member.typeparam: The type of the value produced by the selected callback.
member.param: The condition to evaluate.
The function invoked when is .
The optional function invoked when is . When , the default value of is returned instead.
member.returns: The value returned by the invoked callback, or when is and no callback is supplied.

member.summary: Invokes with when is ; otherwise invokes with when supplied, or returns the default value of .

member.param: The condition to evaluate.
The value passed to the invoked callback.
The function invoked with when is .
The optional function invoked with when is . When , the default value of is returned instead.
member.returns: The value returned by the invoked callback, or when is and no callback is supplied.

The asynchronous function invoked when is .
The optional asynchronous function invoked when is . When , the default value of is returned instead.

The value passed to the invoked callback.

The optional asynchronous function invoked with when is . When , the default value of is returned instead.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.Consts
member.summary: Constants class

member.name: F:Forge.Next.Shared.Consts.WINDOWS_FORMS_CONTROL
member.summary: The windows form control

member.name: F:Forge.Next.Shared.Consts.WINDOWS_DEPENDENCY_OBJECT
member.summary: The windows dependency object

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.Event
member.summary:
Helpers for raising multicast delegates (events) in a fault-tolerant way.
Each subscriber in the delegate's invocation list is invoked independently: a handler that throws does not stop the remaining handlers, and its exception is captured into the result rather than propagated. Invocations can optionally be marshalled onto a WinForms/WPF UI thread (see ), and an optional traces every invocation.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.Fire(System.Delegate,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.Boolean,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Invokes every handler of a multicast delegate one by one, collecting each handler's return value — or the exception it threw — into the returned collection. A failing handler never prevents the remaining handlers from running.
member.param: The (multicast) delegate to invoke. When , an empty collection is returned.
The arguments passed to each handler.
When , a handler whose target is a WinForms control or WPF dependency object is marshalled onto that object's UI thread; otherwise every handler is invoked directly on the calling thread.
An optional logger. When supplied, a debug entry is written before and after each invocation and an error entry is written when a handler throws.
member.returns: A read-only collection holding, in handler order, each handler's return value (which may be ) or, when a handler threw, the that was caught.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.InvokeHandler(System.Delegate,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invokes a single handler, optionally marshalling the call onto the target's UI thread.
member.param: The handler to invoke.
The arguments passed to the handler.
Whether UI targets should be invoked on their UI thread.
member.returns: The handler's return value, or for a void handler.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.GetTargetName(System.Delegate)
member.summary: Resolves a human-readable name for a handler's target: the instance type's full name when the handler is an instance method, or the declaring type's full name when it is static.
member.param: The handler whose target name is requested.
member.returns: The resolved full type name, or when it cannot be determined.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.LogBeforeInvoke(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Delegate,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes the "before invoke" debug entry when debug logging is enabled.
member.param: The optional logger.
The handler about to be invoked.
Whether the invocation marshals onto a UI thread.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.LogAfterInvoke(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Delegate,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes the "after invoke" debug entry when debug logging is enabled.
member.param: The optional logger.
The handler that was invoked.
Whether the invocation marshalled onto a UI thread.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Event.LogInvokeError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Delegate,System.Boolean,System.Exception)
member.summary: Writes the error entry for a failed handler when error logging is enabled.
member.param: The optional logger.
The handler that threw.
Whether the invocation marshalled onto a UI thread.
The exception thrown by the handler.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.ExceptionErrorOrExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods that convert an (together with its inner-exception chain) into values consumable by the ErrorOr library.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ExceptionErrorOrExtensions.ToErrorOrError``1(System.Exception,ErrorOr.ErrorType)
member.summary: Converts and its inner-exception chain into a failed carrying one per exception.
member.typeparam: The value type of the resulting .
member.param: The exception to convert.
The applied to every produced error.
member.returns: A failed containing the errors derived from the exception chain.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ExceptionErrorOrExtensions.ToErrorOrError(System.Exception,ErrorOr.ErrorType)
member.summary: Walks and its chain, producing one per exception. Each error's description is the exception message, and its metadata captures the exception's assembly-qualified type name, message, and stack trace.
member.param: The exception to convert.
The that selects which factory is used for every exception in the chain. Unrecognized values fall back to .
member.returns: A list of errors ordered from the outermost exception to the innermost.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.IEnumerableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for and .

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.IEnumerableExtensions.ForEach``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: ForEach extension method for IEnumerable. This is not a LINQ method, but it is a convenient way to perform an action on each item in a collection.
member.param: The items.
The action.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.IEnumerableExtensions.IsDeepEqual(System.Collections.IEnumerable,System.Collections.IEnumerable)
member.summary: Determines whether two sequences are equal by comparing their elements in order, recursing into nested elements (deep comparison). Strings are treated as scalar values rather than character sequences.
member.param: The first sequence to compare. May be .
The second sequence to compare. May be .
member.returns: if both sequences are , the same reference, or contain deeply equal elements in the same order; otherwise .

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.IEnumerableExtensions.IsDeepEqual``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Determines whether two sequences are equal by comparing their elements in order, recursing into nested elements (deep comparison). Non-enumerable elements are compared with ; strings are treated as scalar values rather than character sequences.
member.typeparam: The element type.
member.param: The first sequence to compare. May be .
The second sequence to compare. May be .
member.returns: if both sequences are , the same reference, or contain deeply equal elements in the same order; otherwise .

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.InitializationException
member.summary: Exception for initialization fail scenarios

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.InitializationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.InitializationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The message.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.InitializationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The message.
The innerException.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.IO.PathExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for working with file-system paths.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.IO.PathExtensions.PerformFolderSecurityCheck(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that the specified folder is usable by performing a write probe: it creates the directory when it does not yet exist, then creates and deletes a uniquely named temporary file inside it.
member.param: The folder path to check. A value yields a validation error.
member.returns: A successful of when the directory exists (or could be created) and a file could be created and deleted within it. Otherwise an error result: a error when is , or the error(s) converted from the caught exception when a file-system operation fails (for example due to missing permissions or an invalid path).

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.ISetExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ISetExtensions.AddRange``1(System.Collections.Generic.ISet{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Adds every element of to . Elements already present are ignored (normal set semantics), and a is treated as empty (no-op).
member.typeparam: The element type of the set.
member.param: The set to add the elements to.
The elements to add; may be (treated as no elements).

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils
member.summary:
Diagnostic logging helpers that dump current process, and loaded-assembly information through an , and that can optionally subscribe to AppDomain events (assembly loads and unhandled exceptions).
All informational output is written at LogLevel.Information (the unhandled-exception trace uses LogLevel.Critical), and every method is a no-op when that level is not enabled. Call first; until then a no-op logger is used.

member.name: P:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.IsSubscribedForAssemblyLoad
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this helper is currently subscribed to the event. Controlled by .
member.value: while assembly-load tracing is active; otherwise .

member.name: P:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.IsSubscribedForAppDomainUnhandledException
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this helper is subscribed to the event. Setting it to subscribes a handler that logs unhandled exceptions at LogLevel.Critical; setting it to unsubscribes. The operation is idempotent and thread-safe.
member.value: while the unhandled-exception handler is subscribed; otherwise .

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.ConfigureLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Sets the used by every logging method. The logger is created from with the category name "LogUtils". When is , logging falls back to a no-op logger.
member.param: The factory used to create the logger, or to disable logging.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.TraceAssemblyLoads(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Starts or stops tracing assembly loads by subscribing to / unsubscribing from the event. While active, information about each newly loaded assembly is logged. Updates accordingly; thread-safe.
member.param: to start tracing assembly loads; to stop.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.LogProcessInfo
member.summary: Logs information about the current process — id, base priority, name, machine, session, start time and (when available) start-info details — at LogLevel.Information. Does nothing when information logging is disabled.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.LogDomainInfo
member.summary: Logs information about the current — id, directories, friendly name, trust flags and (on .NET Framework targets) setup information — at LogLevel.Information. Does nothing when information logging is disabled.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.LogLoadedAssemblies
member.summary: Logs every assembly currently loaded into the together with its properties (full name, location, runtime version, ...) at LogLevel.Information. Does nothing when information logging is disabled.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.Logging.LogUtils.LogAll
member.summary: One-call diagnostic dump: logs process, AppDomain and loaded-assembly information, then starts tracing assembly loads () and subscribes to the unhandled-exception event ().

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for arbitrary objects: exception-safe execution wrappers that return an instead of throwing, and helpers that hash an object based on its JSON representation.

member.name: P:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.DefaultJsonSerializerOptions
member.summary: The used when serializing objects to JSON prior to hashing. Fields are included and reference loops are preserved.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.ProtectAsync``2(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{ErrorOr.ErrorOr{``1}}},ErrorOr.ErrorType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Asynchronously invokes on , catching any thrown exception and converting it into an error.
member.typeparam: The type of the source object.
The type of the successful result.
member.param: The object the function operates on.
The asynchronous function to execute.
The assigned to the error when an exception is caught.
The value forwarded to ConfigureAwait when awaiting .
member.returns: The result produced by , or an error describing the caught exception.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.Protect``2(``0,System.Func{``0,ErrorOr.ErrorOr{``1}},ErrorOr.ErrorType)
member.summary: Invokes on , catching any thrown exception and converting it into an error.
member.typeparam: The type of the source object.
The type of the successful result.
member.param: The object the function operates on.
The function to execute.
The assigned to the error when an exception is caught.
member.returns: The result produced by , or an error describing the caught exception.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.ProtectDoAsync``1(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},ErrorOr.ErrorType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Asynchronously runs on for its side effects, returning the object itself on success or an error describing any thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type of the source object.
member.param: The object the function operates on and that is returned on success.
The asynchronous action to execute.
The assigned to the error when an exception is caught.
The value forwarded to ConfigureAwait when awaiting .
member.returns: when completes, or an error describing the caught exception.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.ProtectDo``1(``0,System.Action{``0},ErrorOr.ErrorType)
member.summary: Runs on for its side effects, returning the object itself on success or an error describing any thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type of the source object.
member.param: The object the action operates on and that is returned on success.
The action to execute.
The assigned to the error when an exception is caught.
member.returns: when completes, or an error describing the caught exception.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA256AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA-256 hash of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA256(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA-256 hash bytes of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA384AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-384 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA-384 hash of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA384(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-384 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA-384 hash bytes of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA512AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-512 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA-512 hash of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA512(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA-512 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA-512 hash bytes of the serialized object.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_256_AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-256 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA3-256 hash of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-256 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_256(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-256 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA3-256 hash bytes of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-256 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_384_AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-384 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA3-384 hash of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-384 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_384(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-384 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA3-384 hash bytes of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-384 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_512_AsInt(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-512 hash of the object's JSON representation and folds it into a 32-bit integer.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: An integer derived from the SHA3-512 hash of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-512 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHA3_512(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes the SHA3-512 hash of the object's JSON representation.
member.param: The object to hash. Must not be .
member.returns: The SHA3-512 hash bytes of the serialized object.
member.exception: SHA3-512 is not supported on the current platform.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.SerializeObjectToJson(System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes to JSON using .
member.param: The object to serialize.
member.returns: The JSON representation of .

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHAFromString(System.String,System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithm)
member.summary: Computes the hash of the UTF-8 bytes of using the supplied algorithm.
member.param: The string to hash.
The hash algorithm to use.
member.returns: The computed hash bytes.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.ObjectExtensions.GetSHAFromStringAsInt(System.String,System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithm)
member.summary: Computes the hash of and folds the resulting bytes into a single 32-bit integer.
member.param: The string to hash.
The hash algorithm to use.
member.returns: An integer derived from the computed hash bytes.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Shared.UI.UIExtensions
member.summary: Helper class for UI reflection operations

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.UI.UIExtensions.IsWinFormsControl(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether is object win forms control
member.param: The object.
member.returns: true if is object win forms control; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.UI.UIExtensions.InvokeOnWinFormsControl(System.Object,System.Delegate,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object})
member.summary: Invokes the on win forms control.
member.param: The control.
The delegate.
The parameters.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.UI.UIExtensions.IsWPFDependency(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether object WPF dependency
member.param: The object.
member.returns: true if object WPF dependency; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Shared.UI.UIExtensions.InvokeOnWPFDependency(System.Object,System.Delegate,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object})
member.summary: Invokes on WPF dependency.
member.param: The control.
The delegate
The parameters.
member.returns: object
